title: BEM-866 queue step heartbeat inline
objective:
Run script:
"""
p = Path('.github/workflows/codex-runner.yml')
text = p.read_text(encoding='utf-8')
old = '''      - name: Process workflow dispatch queue before commit
        if: always()
        env:
          GH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.AI_SYSTEM_GITHUB_PAT }}
        run: |
          python3 scripts/process_workflow_dispatch_queue.py

'''
new = '''      - name: Process workflow dispatch queue before commit
        if: always()
        env:
          GH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.AI_SYSTEM_GITHUB_PAT }}
        run: |
          mkdir -p governance/runtime/curator_dispatch
          echo "# BEM-866 queue step inline heartbeat" > governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM866_QUEUE_STEP_INLINE_HEARTBEAT.md
          echo "Status: STARTED" >> governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM866_QUEUE_STEP_INLINE_HEARTBEAT.md
          python3 scripts/process_workflow_dispatch_queue.py || echo "PROCESSOR_FAILED" >> governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM866_QUEUE_STEP_INLINE_HEARTBEAT.md
          echo "Status_after: FINISHED" >> governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM866_QUEUE_STEP_INLINE_HEARTBEAT.md

'''
if old in text:
    text = text.replace(old, new)
elif 'Process workflow dispatch queue before commit' not in text:
    anchor = '      - name: Commit and push everything
'
    text = text.replace(anchor, new + anchor)
p.write_text(text, encoding='utf-8')
marker = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM866_QUEUE_STEP_INLINE_HEARTBEAT_PATCHED.md')
marker.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
marker.write_text('# BEM-866 queue step inline heartbeat patched
Status: PATCHED
', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(p))
changed_files.append(str(marker))
ops_applied.append('patched queue step with inline heartbeat and non-fatal processor')
"""
No issue comments.
